moe_wna16_marlin_gemm.note: To ensure vLLM picks the gptq_marlin kernel, do not pass --quantization gptq; leave it unset or set to gptq_marlin. This config marks the model as GPTQ (4-bit, group_size 128, symmetric), which vLLM v0.9.0 auto-converts to gptq_marlin when compatible.

machete_prepack_B.note: To ensure vLLM picks the gptq_marlin kernel, do not pass --quantization gptq; leave it unset or set to gptq_marlin. This config marks the model as GPTQ (4-bit, group_size 128, symmetric), which vLLM v0.9.0 auto-converts to gptq_marlin when compatible.

machete_mm.note: To ensure vLLM picks the gptq_marlin kernel, do not pass --quantization gptq; leave it unset or set to gptq_marlin. This config marks the model as GPTQ (4-bit, group_size 128, symmetric), which vLLM v0.9.0 auto-converts to gptq_marlin when compatible.

gptq_marlin_repack.note: To ensure vLLM picks the gptq_marlin kernel, do not pass --quantization gptq; leave it unset or set to gptq_marlin. This config marks the model as GPTQ (4-bit, group_size 128, symmetric), which vLLM v0.9.0 auto-converts to gptq_marlin when compatible.

cutlass_scaled_mm.note: This config enables vLLM's FP8 (W8A8) path so Linear ops dispatch to ops.cutlass_scaled_mm when CUTLASS FP8 is supported on the GPU (e.g., Ada/Hopper). Weights must be saved in FP8 with corresponding *weight_scale* (and optionally *input_scale* for static) tensors as produced by compatible quantizers (e.g., llm-compressor/AutoFP8).
